_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets.
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
_paused_reason: PM paused 2026-07-17 01:00: PM narration was glitching badly (repeated filler) and burning tokens against the director's explicit token concern. Handed back to the director cleanly. Library form-reshape v1 (stacked books) did NOT clearly land — subtle reading, awkward roof; needs a stronger pass or rethink. RESUME IN A FRESH SESSION: set paused=false and /tick. All state is in files. Building direction so far: pastel tone APPROVED; buildings need FORM that expresses meaning (ref at lifetown/docs/design/references/). Library=93 (original), Gym done, both have rooftop emblems (book/dumbbell) approved; the form-expresses-meaning reshape is the open task.
